title: The National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Act, 1998
full_text: The National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Act, 1998 राष्‍ट्रीय औषध-शिक्षा और अनुसंधानसंस्‍थान अधिनियम, 1998 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 199813 Act Number: 13 Enactment Date: 1998-06-26 Act Year: 1998 Short Title: The National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Act, 1998 Hindi Title: राष्‍ट्रीय औषध-शिक्षा और अनुसंधानसंस्‍थान अधिनियम, 1998 Long Title: An Act to declare the institution known as the National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research to be an institution of national importance and to provide for its incorporation and matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Chemicals and Fertilizers Department: Department of Pharmaceuticals Enforcement Date: 08-07-1998 Notification: 8th July, 1998, vide notification No. S.O. 1412(E), dated 7th July, 1998, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Act, 1998 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II THE INSTITUTE CHAPTER III MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Declaration of certain institutions as institutions of national importance. Section 3. Definitions. Section 4. Establishment and incorporation of Institutes. Section 4A. Centres of Institute. Section 5. Omitted. Section 6. Effect of incorporation of Institute. Section 7. Functions of Institutes. Section 8. Powers of Board of an Institute. Section 9. Institutes to be open to all races, creeds and classes. Section 10. Teaching at Institutes. Section 11. Visitor. Section 12. Authorities of Institutes. Section 13. Senate. Section 14. Functions of Senate. Section 15. Functions, powers and duties of Chairperson. Section 16. Director. Section 17. Dean. Section 18. Registrar. Section 19. Powers and duties of other authorities and officers. Section 20. Grants by Central Government. Section 21. Fund of Institutes. Section 22. Setting up of endowment fund. Section 23. Accounts and audit. Section 24. Pension and provident fund. Show Related Subordinates Section 25. Appointments. Section 26. Statutes. Section 27. Statutes how made. Show Related Subordinates Section 28. Ordinances. Show Related Subordinates Section 29. Ordinances how made. Show Related Subordinates Section 30. Tribunal of Arbitration. Section 30A. Establishment of Council. Section 30B. Term of office of, vacancies among, and allowances payable to, members of Council. Section 30C. Functions of Council. Section 30D. Chairman of Council. Section 30E. Power to make rules in respect of matters in this Chapter. Section 31. Acts and proceedings not to be invalidated by vacancies. Section 32. Grant of degrees, etc., by Institutes. Section 33. Sponsored schemes. Section 33A. Power of Central Government to issue directions. Section 34. Power to remove difficulties. Section 35. Transitional provisions. Section 36. Statutes and Ordinances to be published in the Official Gazette and to be laid before Parliament. Show Related Subordinates Section 37. Repeal and saving.
